case_title: JUSTIN ZIPTON VS. CITY MODEL MANAGEMENT, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZIPTON, JUSTIN A MINOR AS TO DEFENDANT CITY MODEL MANAGEMENT, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
